scripts.knowledge:seed:build: tsc --pretty false --skipLibCheck --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --outDir .tmp-knowledge-seed scripts/build-role-seed.ts src/data/careerRoles.ts && node .tmp-knowledge-seed/scripts/build-role-seed.js
scripts.knowledge:seed:validate: tsc --pretty false --skipLibCheck --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --outDir .tmp-knowledge-seed-validate scripts/validate-role-seed.ts src/lib/career-agent/knowledgeSchema.ts && node .tmp-knowledge-seed-validate/scripts/validate-role-seed.js
scripts.knowledge:seed:test: tsc --pretty false --skipLibCheck --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --outDir .tmp-knowledge-seed-test scripts/test-knowledge-seed-pipeline.ts src/lib/career-agent/knowledgeSchema.ts && node .tmp-knowledge-seed-test/scripts/test-knowledge-seed-pipeline.js
scripts.stage:test: tsc --pretty false --skipLibCheck --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --outDir .tmp-stage-test scripts/test-stage-detection.ts src/lib/career-agent/stageDetection.ts && node .tmp-stage-test/scripts/test-stage-detection.js
scripts.stage:persist-test: tsc --pretty false --skipLibCheck --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --outDir .tmp-stage-persist-test scripts/test-stage-persistence.ts src/lib/career-agent/stageDetection.ts && node .tmp-stage-persist-test/scripts/test-stage-persistence.js
scripts.recommendation:gate:test: tsc --pretty false --skipLibCheck --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --outDir .tmp-recommendation-gate-test scripts/test-recommendation-gates.ts src/lib/career-agent/recommendationGate.ts && node .tmp-recommendation-gate-test/scripts/test-recommendation-gates.js
